prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约182→274→174→159→193名，近5年波动较大，2022年因断档跌至274名后快速回升，2025年基准约193名；近3年位次在159–193区间窄 幅波动，整体呈小幅前移趋势；该校在陕西物理类招生计划：2021年7人、2022年12人、2023年12人、2024年12人、2025年12人；2026年计划27人，较202 5年大幅扩招125%，为近年最大增幅，显著增加录取机会，竞争压力明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第5名，稳居 全国顶尖高校前列，办学层次极高；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风及学校管理类事件；但2025年周期曾获偏正面评价（新闻传播学A++学科荣 誉）；抖音热度排名总榜第4（高热），综合热度1074万，短视频平台曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高位；复旦大学拥有27个A-/A/A+一级学科，其中数学A+、物 理学A+、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A、材料科学与工程A-等与物理类招生专业高度关联，学科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电 子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度为高热推荐，与复旦物理类开设的工科试验班（香农计划、集成电路领军班、计算与智能领军班等）、计算机科学与技术、数学类等 专业方向高度契合；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争，但复旦扩招幅度远超考生增速；复旦 大学位于上海市，属东部沿海一线城市，对陕西考生有较强吸引力；该校在陕西物理类招生计划从12人扩至27人，扩招比例远超全国平均，体现对陕西生源的倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次193名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招125%、陕西物理类考生增加约19.7%以及抖音高热关注度等多重因素：扩招带来的录取机会增加是最大正向因素，但考生 规模扩大和学校高热度形成对冲。经供需弹性模型测算并结合其他信息修正，预测2026年物理类最低位次约353名，区间303–403名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 182 → 274 → 174 → 159 → 193, with significant fluctuations in the past 5 years. After a drop to 274 in 2022 due to a gap, it quickly recovered. The baseline for 2025 is about 193; in the last 3 years, rankings fluctuated narrowly between 159 and 193, showing a slight forward trend. The enrollment plan for Fudan University in Shaanxi Physics Category: 7 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 27, a substantial increase of 125% compared to 2025, the largest increase in recent years, significantly boosting admission chances and easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 5th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, firmly among the top universities nationwide with an extremely high level of operation. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics and school management. However, in the 2025 cycle, it received a somewhat positive evaluation (honor of A++ discipline in Journalism and Communication). Douyin popularity ranking: 4th overall (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 10.74 million, extremely high exposure on short video platforms, and sustained high attention for applications. Fudan University has 27 A-/A/A+ first-level disciplines, including Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A-, which are highly related to Physics Category enrollment majors. The discipline strength is top-notch, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are highly recommended with high social heat, closely matching the engineering experimental classes (Xiangnong Plan, Integrated Circuit Leading Class, Computing and Intelligence Leading Class, etc.), Computer Science and Technology, Mathematics, and other major directions offered by Fudan's Physics Category. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025. The expansion of the examinee pool intensifies overall competition, but Fudan's expansion rate far exceeds the examinee growth rate. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier coastal city in eastern China, which strongly attracts Shaanxi examinees. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shaanxi has expanded from 12 to 27, with an expansion ratio far exceeding the national average, reflecting a tilt towards Shaanxi students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 193, the significant 125% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 19.7% increase in Shaanxi Physics Category examinees, and the high Douyin attention: the increased admission opportunities due to expansion are the biggest positive factor, but the expansion of the examinee pool and the school's high heat offset each other. After calculation using the supply-demand elasticity model and correction with other information, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 353, with a range of 303–403.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligence Leading Talent Class).

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 303–403, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Engineering Experimental Class Future Information Leading Talent Class, Computer Science and Technology Top Talent Class) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Xiangnong Plan, Integrated Circuit Leading Class) as a reach. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. All majors in Fudan's Physics Category are top popular directions with minimal ranking differences. It is recommended to make a comprehensive decision based on personal interests and discipline evaluation levels.
